string: [Test] Release memory when memory is tight
Menu bar common function mode only
You can listen to this page
Listen to this page with AI
Information about this store opened at full height
Information about this store opened at half height
Dismiss and show next available action
New actions available near top of the screen
Option available near top of the screen
Couldn’t minimize tab. Try again later.
Opening Chrome without a profile lock will remove your saved passwords and payment methods from the car. Using a profile lock keeps this data secure.
Also delete bookmarks, history, and more from this car
Continue without a car profile lock?
Chrome needs storage access to download files.
Your current Chromium settings have been updated to allow websites to access third-party cookies. You can change this setting any time.
Automatically pop up video resource list when playing web video

Note: why not directly replace the web player like UC and quark, because the endless forms of encryption require huge labor costs to constantly update. This browser is only developed by one amateur, unable to maintain this function.

You are performing a MP4 conversion operation. Currently, only some m3u8 files are supported and any novel encryption may cause the merge to fail. Therefore, if you do not have a specific requirement and are only doing this for viewing purposes, please do not perform the merge operation.
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this car
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this phone
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this tablet
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this tv
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this device
Make sure the other device is on the same Wi-Fi network as this watch

Close a window or manage windows
Select manage to see all windows
you must enter the phone number as the account number
Multi-Link Helper: Redirect Directly if Only One Link Found
Enable multi-thread download (due to some website restrictions, opening multi-thread will cause download exceptions)
If there is a Firefox version available, please install the Firefox version. If there is an MV2 version available, please install the MV2 version. MV3 adaptation is currently in progress.
Name changes take some time to take effect. Please be patient.
Mimictic homepage echo displaying historical words
You are installing scripts. It should be noted that you have not installed script manager, such as oil monkey, violent monkey, etc. Please go to download a script manager first
the new pseudo theme does not support custom background now. Do you want to change theme?
Bookmark cloud service is currently checked, but you need to log in first. Do you want to log in?
Insufficient data for processing the PDF document
The request cannot be completed because the network is disconnected or the server denies access. (If vpn is enabled, please check the vpn status.) Please click retry
Network error, please try again later
Network connection failed, please check your network settings
Network timeout, please check your network connection and try again

Chromium won’t save:
  • Your browsing history
  • Cookies and site data
  • Information entered in forms

Others who use this device won’t see your activity, so you can browse more privately. This won't change how data is collected by websites you visit and the services they use, including Google. Downloads, bookmarks and reading list items will be saved.

Your activity might still be visible to:
  • Websites you visit
  • Your employer or school
  • Your internet service provider
New group from your other device
Only the last open is not closed
Not manually closed within one day
Not manually closed within a week
Whether to switch automatically next time
Due to Tencent, it will not take effect until the next time the app is launched
To continue, turn on NFC in Android settings

Browser night mode depends on this extension. Toggling browser night mode will automatically adjust the extension is operation. Clicking Still want to control means disabling the browser is automatic control, and clicking Confirm means allowing the browser to continue managing it.
Dark mode with a dark background image.
The browser night mode depends on this extension, and switching the browser night mode will automatically adjust the running state of this extension. Manual adjustment is not recommended
Currently in night mode, the system is dimmed by default. You will not see the real-time effect
Storage does not exist, unable to download
Camera permission is not granted and is needed to read QR codes
This is not a pingable website.
Sorry, the text cannot be loaded. Please try another webpage.
Level 3 directory generation is not supported at present
The current address cannot be removed from the whitelist.
%1$s may need to take additional steps to verify your payment
Directory movement is not supported at the moment
You haven't linked any other devices yet. You can add them using the following methods:
No passkeys sheet opened at full height
There aren't any passkeys for %1$s on this device
The data has not been synchronized yet. Please click Synchronize on the computer plug-in to trigger an upload.

Due to the use of the Huawei Scan Code Enhanced component, both storage and camera permissions are required to scan QR codes. You have not granted both permissions. Please go to Settings - Apps - Permission Management to enable them.
Cardboard SDK requires camera and write to external storage permission to read the QR code and save the encoded device parameters.
All have been detected and there are no updates available.
Enable Smart Player without Encrypting Video
You have no extensions to recover
task list is empty, click add task
Do not create the same button
Files saved by websites appear here
file management app not found, please install file management app and try again
not allowed in the current website
You cannot translate due to regulatory requirements
Your system does not support TTS service. Do you want to download the plug-in service?
Will no longer prompt for updates
Short video search results will not be displayed in the next search
Show short video search results for next search
Unable to read the icon of this page
You have not installed the plug-in. Click the upper right corner to enter the plug-in store
The response event is not effective. The page may not be loaded completely, or the current page may not be effective. Please wait for the arrow to appear before clicking.
your song has no song list, would you like to add
The current sort mode cannot be adjusted. Please modify the sort mode to the default sort.
You may be on the home page, unable to get the domain name of the web page
No announcement updates will no longer display announcements
You’ll be able to easily manage media controls, Incognito sessions, downloads and more
Notification permission flow opened at full height
You'll no longer receive notifications from %1$s.
Help improve spam protection by sharing notification content and the site's URL with Google. Content may be reviewed by humans.

Chrome colors bottom sheet opened at half height

Discover feed bottom sheet opened at half height

Customize your new tab page bottom sheet closed
Customize your new tab page bottom sheet opened at full height
Customize your new tab page bottom sheet opened at half height

My shortcuts bottom sheet opened at half height

New tab page cards bottom sheet opened at half height

New tab page appearance theme collections bottom sheet opened at full height

Control your stories and activity here
Tabs that you've opened in Chrome on your other devices will appear here.
Text cannot be found in the picture. Text extraction failed
Offline pages do not currently support renaming
Viewing an offline copy of this page
Please migrate soon, support will be discontinued
An error occurred while downloading the content.
Insufficient memory to download the selected content.
Device cannot open the content to be downloaded.
The above has been retrieved for you
Extracting videos from web pages with one click
Only http/https web pages are allowed to perform relevant settings
only supported by system player, please switch player first
The current web page security certificate is incorrect. There may be privacy disclosure. Do you want to continue browsing?
Delete browsing data; select data to delete
All enabled extensions have been checked, and there are no updates available.
Failed to open. Please try again later
unfinnd the Application to open this type of file ,Download path: Internal Storage/Download/
Open history in a new page

You are turning on the No Reload function of violent return. When you step back, the original page will not be refreshed. This function conflicts with open new page of web page support. Click OK to turn off the automatic new page support of web page

You are opening a web page to support the opening of a new page, and support the web page to pull up a new label page. This function conflicts with violent return without overloading function. Click OK to turn off the support of violent return without overloading function on the web page
The computer displays suspended balls when it is online.
Tilted, tablet mode will appear in the upper right corner
Open the suggested URL specified in the downloaded content?

Please open file permission for app in system settings and try again
Unable to open the photo picker
open the yujian browser v5.4+ scan
Open preview mode and try again by long pressing
Atom home page is loading, please wait. If it takes too long, please refresh the page.
pop up window is intercepted. Do you want to open
the browser requests jump. Do you want to open
The file may be moving to an external directory, please wait (setting the download directory to an external directory is not recommended)
Export multimedia files to the gallery
The current page is jumping to an external page This is not normal behavior
Allow before the end of this application
Permanently prohibit jumping to this domain name
Turn off the external chain interception function
If the web page font does not change after setting the font, please enable this option; it is mandatory if a TTF file is imported externally.
Export common format CSV password file
Close any bubbles or overlays from other apps. Then, try again.
This site can’t ask for your permission
Development, white list development instructions and Disclaimers
It is detected that your current device is a tablet. Do you want to open the tablet UI
display recent collections in tablet mode
Page broken for the PDF document
Learn about its source and topic
This site determines things you like and then suggests ads to other sites
This site determines things you like and then suggests ads to other sites. This site also gets your ad topics from Chrome to show you more relevant ads.
This site gets your ad topics from Chrome to show you more relevant ads
Camera is turned off in Android settings
You are viewing an offline copy of this page from %1$s
You are viewing a preview of this page
This PDF file is from a site using an insecure connection
Chrome will block cookies again today
This deletes cookies and other site data for %1$s
Cookies and other site data are used to remember you, for example to sign you in or to personalize ads. To manage cookies for all sites, see <link>Settings</link>.
Chrome will limit cookies again today
You allowed third-party cookies on this site
Help us improve Chrome by telling us why you allowed third-party cookies. <link>Send feedback</link>
Try temporarily allowing third-party cookies, which means less browsing protection but site features are more likely to work as expected.
Site not working? Third-party cookies blocked
You temporarily allowed this site to use third-party cookies, which means less browsing protection but site features are more likely to work as expected. <link>Send feedback</link>
This means site features should work as expected, but you may have less browsing protection. <link>Send feedback</link>
This content is from %1$s, delivered by Google.
You have chosen to turn off security warnings for this site.
To save you data, this page's images have been optimized by Google.
This offline page is from %1$s and may differ from the online version.
This page may differ from the online version.
Site shows intrusive or misleading ads
This choice will reset permissions for %1$s

Chromium blocks third-party cookies in Incognito, but your administrator allowed third-party cookies for this site. Incognito can also provide additional tracking protections. Manage Incognito tracking protections in <link>Settings</link>.

Chromium blocks third-party cookies in Incognito, but you made an exception for this site. Incognito can also provide additional tracking protections. Manage Incognito tracking protections in <link>Settings</link>.
Third-party cookies are blocked. Incognito can also provide additional tracking protections. Manage Incognito tracking protections in <link>Settings</link>.
Protections are paused until all Incognito tabs are closed. <link>Send feedback</link>
You blocked sites from using third-party cookies to track you as you browse. Visit settings to <link>manage access to third-party cookies</link>.
Chrome limits most sites from using third-party cookies to track you as you browse. Visit settings to <link>manage access to third-party cookies</link>.
Chrome blocks sites from using third-party cookies to track you as you browse. Visit settings to <link>manage access to third-party cookies</link>.

Chrome limits most sites from using third-party cookies. But third-party cookies are allowed on this site because it relies on them to provide basic services.
Visit settings to <link>manage access to third-party cookies</link>.
X The current page is in compatibility mode, expansion has been disabled
Reading mode is not supported on the current page
Full screen configuration for web player
If the webpage loads abnormally/blank, please click here
Make it easier to customize zoom for different sites
Show zoom option in main menu
When enabled, Chrome will adjust web content size to match your Android setting
You can zoom in or out on sites you visit
Even with eyes protected by the green spectacles Dorothy and her friends were at first dazzled by the
Chapter 11: The Wonderful Emerald City of Oz
Make text and images larger or smaller for all sites you visit
Paint Preview does not have accessibility support.
will play you the next episode
Option to approve or not approve a website closed
Option to approve or not approve a website
Option to approve or not approve a website opened at full height
%1$s wants you to approve this website:
Show saved passwords and password options
Deleting this password will not delete your account on %1$s. Change your password or delete your account on %1$s to keep it safe from others.
You can use saved passwords on any device. They're saved to Google Password Manager for %1$s.
Passwords are saved to Password Manager on this device
Passwords are saved to Google Password Manager on this device
Make sure the password you are saving matches your password for %1$s
To copy passwords, first set a screen lock on your device
Deleting this password will not delete your account on %1$s
You already saved this username for this site
To view passwords, first set a screen lock on your device
Turn on screen lock in Settings to export your passwords from this device
You won’t need to remember this password. It will be saved to Google Password Manager for %1$s.
You won’t need to remember this password. It will be saved to Google Password Manager.
Can’t find that password. Check your spelling and try again.
Password saving is turned off by your administrator
Password saving is turned on by your administrator
Learn how to use Google Drive
Your device doesn’t have an app to store the passwords file.
Try the following tips: make sure there is enough space on your device, try to export again.
Verify it’s you to get all your passwords on this device
Automatically sign in to websites using stored credentials. When the feature is off, you’ll be asked for verification every time before signing in to a website.
When you use a password, Chrome warns you if it has been published online. When doing this, your passwords and usernames are encrypted, so they can’t be read by anyone, including Google.
Warn you if a password was compromised in a data breach
To protect your privacy, Chrome will not autofill your password in this field.
To turn off payment app in Chrome, go to your <link1>payment settings</link1>
On some websites, you can pay with above supported payment apps on your device.
Manage your loyalty cards in Google Wallet
You can manage cards and addresses in BEGIN_LINKSettingsEND_LINK.
Cards and addresses are from Chrome and your Google Account (%1$s). You can manage them in BEGIN_LINKSettingsEND_LINK.
Cards and addresses are from Chrome. You can manage them in BEGIN_LINKSettingsEND_LINK.
There was an error processing your order. Please try again.
To see delivery methods and requirements, select an address
To see pickup methods and requirements, select an address
To see shipping methods and requirements, select an address
Can’t deliver to this address. Select a different address.
Can’t pick up from this address. Select a different address.
Can’t ship to this address. Select a different address.
Failed to process the PDF document!
Sorry, your %1$s permission is not opened, so it can not be served normally please click Settings -> find Popon -> permission management -> %2$s -> allow in the application to
The QR code scanning function requires your authorization for camera access and local media file reading permission (select image to recognize QR code)

To read the ad-blocking rule files on your device, we need to request storage permission in order to open the file picker so you can select images or files. You may choose to deny this permission, but the webpage will not be able to complete the upload.
Often used for weather, local news, and more
Often used for directions, deliveries, and more
To allow you to customize the download path and save files to your specified directory, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to change the download directory.
To read browser extension/plugin files (.crx or .zip) for installation, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use the extension feature.
To read CSV files and import your account and password data, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use the import feature.
Unable to select media due to denied permissions
This is used to provide scanning services.
Grant the Camera permission in Settings > Apps > Permission manager
To select an image from your gallery and set it as your profile picture, we need to request storage access. If you decline, you will be unable to change your avatar.
To read images and set them as homepage icon backgrounds, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use background customization.
To read JavaScript files and add custom browser scripts, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use the custom script feature.
To select images from your gallery and set them as the browser homepage logo, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use this customization.
To generate and save backup files of your bookmarks and settings for data migration or recovery, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to export backup files.
To save selected or downloaded web images to your gallery/local storage, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to save images.
To read images as attachments for complaints or feedback, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to upload screenshots or image evidence.
To read font files (.ttf) for custom web font styles, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use custom fonts.
To download and save video files to your local storage for offline viewing or management, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to download videos.
To respond to file upload requests from websites and open the file picker, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but file uploading on websites will not work.
To select images from your gallery for Search by Image (reverse image search), we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to upload local images for searching.
Link Chrome and other Google services for personalization and other purposes
To get the most personalized experience, include Chrome in Web & App Activity and linked Google services
The phone number has been bound
This picture cannot be read due to path permissions. Please try moving this picture to an album or changing another picture
Information response (100-199) n Successful response (200-299) n Redirect message (300-399) n Client error response (400-499) n Server error response (500-599) n Unable to link (-1)
Pay with Pix directly in Chrome next time
Enable Pix by linking your account quickly
Pay in Chrome without using your bank app
To turn off Pix in Chrome, go to your <link1>payment settings</link1>
Your transaction didn’t go through. No funds were withdrawn from your account.
Account info is encrypted and kept private
Place your phone into your Cardboard viewer
Place your phone into your %s viewer
Playback failed 1 It may be a network exception. Please try switching WiFi / traffic 2 It may be that the video encryption cannot be played. Please go back to the web native player
Do not pop up this page again
A browser extension is requesting permission to send notifications. Please allow notification access first.
Please click Install online kernel on the page！
Please agree and check the privacy policy and privacy terms first
You have set to prohibit this webpage from running this extension. Please click the modify button above to enter the running status editing
Failed to retrieve certificate. Please refresh the webpage and try again.
Please enter the web page - automatically sniff the content
please enter the content to search
please check the input box text you want to save
Long press and drag can adjust the window size.
You have not opened the Internet service, please go to open it first.
Please select the bookmark you want to move first
Please select a custom event (click back)
Please select the view to edit first
Please select at least one file to download
please fill in the specific information first
Please set a lock screen password on your phone before you can view passwords.
Please enter the download link to the Extensions, which supports zip, CRX and xpi. Please ensure that the download link can be opened normally

the extension you are currently installing has been included in the extension store. It is recommended to install the version of the extension store. Confirm that the store version will be downloaded for you. Click Cancel to continue installing for you.
cannot find the extension file (.Crx. Xpi) for installation
failed to unzip the file, please make sure this is a complete compressed package
due to legal requirements, this Extensions must use the version of the Extensions store. I hope you can understand
Allow to run in traceless browsing mode
Extension file download failure may be due to network instability; Extension link failure and other reasons
Expand abnormal behavior interception, such as automatic jump of home page status
Extension installation error:%1$s please try again later, to no avail, please contact the developer

1. The Extensions has no binding relationship with the browser. The content of the Extensions store is collected in edge Extensions center and Firefox development center. It is safe to some extent, but you must realize that some Extensions may be unsafe, and the resulting results need to be borne by yourself. 2. The Extensions library is still in constant grabbing, and some Extensions may not run due to PC properties. Some Extensions may not comply with the law. You have the right and obligation to help us improve it. Once verified, the plug-in will be removed from the shelf. We sincerely abide by local laws and your user experience. 3. If you are a company and an Extensions has caused illegal infringement to you, please tell us immediately and we will deal with it reasonably. For example, add a white list to your site (this Extensions is not allowed to run) or directly remove this Extensions
You must read the following terms carefully
Extension is starting up, please wait...
The extended runtime framework has been recycled by the system. Please restart the browser
The Extensions installation is successful. Do you want to check it
If your extension list is empty or extensions fail to install, please click OK to recover the data
One or more add-ons have stopped running and are currently restarting.

The extension failed to start for the following reasons: · The extension process was stopped by the system (requires restart) · There is an abnormal extension, the most recently installed extension is:

An extension is causing the browser's extension framework to crash, but it is not possible to determine which one it is. Do you agree to uninstall the recently installed extension to attempt recovery? The most recent extension is:
This extension is not set to run in seamless mode, please go to the extension settings to allow

Extensions installation succeeded. Please go to the web page. . if you are installing pop-up Extensions, please pay attention to the Extensions ball in the right corner of the page, and click it to experience the corresponding functions · if you are installing injection Extensions, please pay attention to the changes of the web page, and usually add some touchable buttons at the edge
Extension features have been added to the menu bar, click here to view
The current extension is disabled in private mode. Go to allow it to run?
Massive Extensions, oil monkey script, adguard
Placeholder Plus Address Create Suggestion IPH String.
To show your cursor, press ESC
To show your cursor, switch apps, reload the page, or go back
strong traceless (cause unable to log in)
Interception has been carried out following the permission management. If there is any modification, please go to the permission management to modify it.
Force page zooming (very few websites have abnormal layout)
Web page download request is rejected according to permission settings
Full screen permission of web page

Permission management: the control of web page permissions currently includes web page open app, web page write to clipboard, web page replace player, web page Jump to external link, web page pop-up, web page request download and web page full screen permission, which can help you master the initiative of web page browsing
External chain monitoring, Web page a is not allowed to automatically jump to web page B. manual authorization is required, which can effectively prevent misclicks of advertisements
Saving permission configuration is not supported in traceless mode. Please close it first
You are currently customizing your Sync settings. To finish turning on sync, tap the Confirm button near the bottom of the screen. Navigate up

Because the preloaded pages are encrypted, Google will not learn anything about the preloaded page content. Google servers will learn which sites are privately preloaded. This information is only used to preload the pages, and is not linked to other information from your Google Account.
More frequently preloads pages that Chrome thinks you are likely to visit. This setting may result in increased data use.
When a site or app asks to privately preload links on their page, Chrome encrypts and preloads pages through Google servers without cookies. This hides your identity from the preloaded site.
If you allow cookies, Chrome may use them for preloading.
More pages are preloaded. Pages may be preloaded through Google servers when requested by other sites or apps.
Pages load only after you open them
Because the preloaded pages are encrypted, and the site or app linking to the pages is a Google site or app, Google servers don’t receive new information when privately preloading these pages.
Preloads pages that Chrome thinks you are likely to visit.
When a Google site or app asks to privately preload links on their page, Chrome encrypts and preloads pages through Google servers without cookies. This hides your identity from the preloaded site.
If you allow cookies, Chrome may use them for preloading.
Some of the pages you visit are preloaded. Pages may be preloaded through Google servers when linked from a Google site or app.
You can browse and search faster when Chrome preloads pages that it thinks you might visit
Back up again to make sure to exit game mode

Please be aware that if your file contains information of a higher security level, such as privacy or confidentiality, please do not use the preview service. The preview service is provided by a third-party cloud service and cannot guarantee reliability. By agreeing to this agreement, you will enter the preview service, and you will be responsible for any risks associated with it. We do not assume any obligation to protect your files.
Price drop on your open tab, from %1$s to %2$s, %3$s, %4$s
Hide price drops on tabs card
See which item in your open tabs has a lower price
Price history graph for %s. Use two fingers to move left and right to explore prices over time.
Price history across the web for this option
Price insights bottom sheet opened at full height
You'll get notified if the price drops on any site
Get alerts when the price drops on any site across the web
Tap to search buying options for the product in a new tab.
Manage how you receive price drop alerts for products you track
Chrome notifications must be on. You can turn them on in <link>%1$s</link>.
Price drop alerts are on. You can change this in <link>%1$s</link>.
Tracking price. Get alerts if the price drops on any site.
Something went wrong. Couldn’t update Track price.
Get alerts if the price drops on any site

You can <link1>manage what Chrome data is saved</link1> in your Google Account.
For more settings that use data to improve your Chrome experience, go to <link2>Google Services</link2>.
For more settings that use data to improve your Chrome experience, go to <link>Google Services</link>.
Sites can use third-party cookies to personalize content and ads, and learn about actions you take on other sites

Sites can't use third-party cookies to personalize content and ads, and learn about actions you take on other sites, unless you allow related sites to access them. Some site features may not work as expected.
Explore more settings below or finish now
Privacy guide explanation opened at full height
Privacy guide explanation opened at half height
You’ll have your history and tabs on all your devices so you can continue what you were doing
You’ll have your history on all your synced devices so you can continue what you were doing
The URLs you visit are saved to your Google Account
If Google is also your default search engine, you’ll see better, contextually relevant suggestions
If you also share Chrome usage reports, those reports include the URLs you visit
You’ll browse faster because content is proactively loaded based on your current webpage visit
URLs you visit are sent to Google to predict what sites you might visit next
You’ll get improved suggestions in the address bar
Review key privacy and security controls
Chrome gives you more control over the ads you see and limits what sites can learn about you when they show you personalized ads.
Manage your ad topics and other settings to limit what sites can learn about you to show you personalized ads
Choose whether to include Chrome history for more personalized experiences in Google services
Take a guided tour of key privacy and security controls. For more options, go to individual settings.
A guide of your privacy choices
Whether an ad or content you see is personalized can depend on many things, including ad topics, your cookie settings, and if the site you’re viewing customizes your experience.
When on, ad topics notes topics you might be interested in based on your recent browsing history
Chrome uses privacy measures like encryption, noise, and aggregation to help limit the information shared with sites that use your ad topics
Chrome auto-deletes topics that are older than 4 weeks
You can see your ad topics and block the ones you don’t want shared with sites at any time in Chrome settings
We’re launching new privacy features that give you more choice over the ads you see.

Ad topics limit what sites and their advertising partners can learn about you to show you personalized ads. Chrome can note topics of interest based on your recent browsing history. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for relevant topics to personalize the ads you see.

Ad topics help sites show you relevant ads while protecting your browsing history and identity. Chrome can note topics of interest based on your recent browsing history. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for relevant topics to personalize the ads you see.

Ad topics help websites show you relevant ads while protecting your browsing history and identity. Chrome can note topics of interest based on your recent browsing history. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for relevant topics to personalize the ads you see.
You can see ad topics in settings and block the ones you don’t want shared with sites. Chrome also auto-deletes ad topics that are older than 4 weeks.
You can change your mind any time in Chrome settings.
You can make changes in ad privacy settings

Websites and their advertising partners can use ad topics to personalize content and ads for you. Unlike other personalization methods, such as third-party cookies, ad topics help to limit what sites can learn about you while you browse.
Your ad topics are based on your recent browsing history, a list of sites you’ve visited using Chrome on this device.

Chrome notes topics of interest as you browse. Topic labels are predefined and include things like, Arts & Entertainment, Shopping, and Sports. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for a few of your topics to personalize the ads you see.

Chrome auto-deletes topics that are older than 4 weeks. As you keep browsing, a topic might reappear on the list. You can also block topics you don’t want Chrome to share with sites and turn ad topics off at any time in Chrome settings.
How do sites use this data?
How can you manage this data?
What data is used: Your ad topics are based on your recent browsing history, a list of sites you’ve visited using Chrome on this device.
What data is used? Your ad topics are based on your recent browsing history, a list of sites you've visited using Chrome on this device.

How we use this data: Chrome notes topics of interest as you browse. Topic labels are predefined and include things like, Arts & Entertainment, Shopping, and Sports. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for a few of your topics (but not your browsing history) to personalize the ads you see.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also store ad topics for longer than 4 weeks and combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>.

How do sites use this data? Chrome notes topics of interest as you browse. Topic labels are predefined and include things like, Arts & Entertainment, Shopping, and Sports. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for a few of your topics to personalize the ads you see.

How you can manage your data: Chrome auto-deletes topics that are older than 4 weeks. As you keep browsing, a topic might reappear on the list. You can also block topics you don’t want Chrome to share with sites and turn ad topics off at any time in Chrome settings.

How can you manage this data? Chrome auto-deletes topics that are older than 4 weeks. As you keep browsing, a topic might reappear on the list. You can also block topics you don't want Chrome to share with sites and turn ad topics off at any time in Chrome settings.
Turn on an ad privacy feature
Allow sites to share limited information with one another when personalizing content and ads?
You can make changes in ad privacy settings

For example, if you visit a site to find recipes for dinner, the site might decide that you’re interested in cooking. Later, another site may show you a related ad for a grocery delivery service suggested by the first site.
Sites and their advertising partners can use your activity to personalize ads on other sites.

Chrome auto-deletes sites that are older than 90 days. A site you visit again might reappear on the list. You can also block a site from suggesting ads for you and turn site-suggested ads off at any time in Chrome settings.
How do sites use this data?
How can you manage this data?
Based on your activity, such as the sites you visit and what you view or click, other sites can suggest related ads as you continue browsing
You can see a list of these sites and block the ones you don’t want in settings
Limited types of data are shared between sites, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site
Chrome uses privacy measures to limit the information sites can share with one another
With ad measurement, limited types of data are shared between sites to measure the performance of their ads, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site.

How do sites use this data? Sites you visit can ask Chrome for information that helps them measure the performance of their ads. Chrome protects your privacy by limiting the information sites can share with one another.

Site-suggested ads help protect your browsing history and identity while enabling sites to show you relevant ads. Based on your activity, a site you visited can suggest related ads as you continue browsing. You can see a list of these sites and block the ones you don’t want in settings.
With ad measurement, limited types of data are shared between sites to measure the performance of their ads, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site.
We’re launching new ways to limit what sites can learn about you when they show you personalized ads, for example:
Ad privacy features help limit what websites and their advertising partners can learn about you when they show you personalized ads.
You can make changes in Chrome settings.
You can make changes in ad privacy settings
What data is used: Your activity on a site you visit using Chrome on this device.

How sites use this data: Sites can store information with Chrome about things you like. For example, if you visit a site about marathon training, the site might decide that you’re interested in running shoes. Later, if you visit a different site, that site can show you an ad for running shoes suggested by the first site.

How you can manage your data: Chrome auto-deletes sites that are older than 30 days. A site you visit again might reappear on the list. You can also block a site from suggesting ads for you and turn site-suggested ads off at any time in Chrome settings.
Sites you visit can ask Chrome for information that helps them measure the performance of their ads. Chrome protects your privacy by limiting the information sites can share with one another.

Your Android device may include a similar setting. If ad measurement is turned on in Chrome and on your Android device, a company may be able to measure the effectiveness of an ad across web sites you visit and apps you use.
More about site-suggested ads and ad measurement

Site-suggested ads help protect your browsing history and identity while allowing sites to show you relevant ads. Using your activity, such as how you spend your time on sites you visit, other sites can suggest related ads as you continue browsing. You can see a list of these sites and block the ones you don't want in settings.

How do sites use this data? Sites and their advertising partners can use your activity to personalize ads on other sites. For example, if you visit a site to find recipes for dinner, the site might decide that you're interested in cooking. Later, another site may show you a related ad for a grocery delivery service suggested by the first site.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>

How can you manage this data? Chrome auto-deletes sites that are older than 30 days. A site you visit again might reappear on the list. You can also block a site from suggesting ads for you and turn site-suggested ads off at any time in Chrome settings.
Other ad privacy features now available
Learn more about how Google protects your data in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

We’re launching a new ad privacy feature called ad measurement. Chrome shares only very limited information among sites and apps, such as when an ad was shown to you, to help measure the performance of ads.
Websites can only share limited information, like when you see an ad on Chrome, with other websites
Learn more about how Google protects your data in our Privacy Policy.
Your Android phone or tablet may also have this setting
You can make changes in Chrome ad privacy settings
This means that ad measurement could be turned on in both Chrome and Android
If turned on in both places, then the performance of an ad could be measured across both the websites you visit and the apps you use

Your Android device may include a similar setting. If this setting is turned on in Chrome and on your Android device, a company may be able to measure the effectiveness of an ad across websites you visit and apps you use.
New ad privacy feature now available
Chrome is helping websites to measure the performance of their ads
Whether an ad or content you see is personalized can depend on many things, including these settings, your cookie settings, and if the site you’re viewing customizes your experience.
Chrome uses privacy measures like encryption, noise, and aggregation to help limit the information shared with sites that use your topics and activity
Chrome regularly auto-deletes topics and sites that suggest ads for you
You can block specific topics and sites you don’t like at any time in Chrome settings
We’re launching new privacy features that give you more choice over the ads you see.

Chrome notes topics of interest based on your recent browsing history. Also, sites you visit can determine what you like. Later, sites can ask for this information to show you personalized ads. You can choose which topics and sites are used to show you ads.
To measure the performance of an ad, limited types of data are shared between sites, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site.
You can make changes in Chrome settings.

Websites and their advertising partners can use your browsing history and activity on the sites you visit to personalize content and ads. Those sites can then share limited information with other sites to help them measure the performance of their ads.
Topic labels are predefined and include things like, Arts & Entertainment, Shopping, and Sports. Later, a site you visit can ask Chrome for a few of your topics to personalize the ads you see.
Chrome auto-deletes topics that are older than 4 weeks

For example, if you visit a site to find recipes for dinner, the site might decide that you’re interested in cooking. Later, another site may show you a related ad for a grocery delivery service suggested by the first site.
Chrome auto-deletes sites that are older than 90 days
Limited types of data are shared between sites to measure the performance of an ad, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site
Chrome uses privacy measures to limit the information sites can share with one another

Chrome notes topics of interest as you browse to help sites and their advertising partners personalize content and ads. Compared to third-party cookies, a commonly used advertising technology, limited information is shared with sites while you browse.

Site-suggested ads helps to limit what sites and their advertising partners can learn about you when they show you personalized content and ads. Based on your activity, such as the sites you visit and what you view or click, other sites can suggest related ads as you continue browsing.
With ad measurement, sites you visit can share information with other sites that helps them measure the performance of their ads.

Your Android settings may also have ad measurement. If this setting is turned on in Chrome and in Android, then the performance of an ad could be measured across both the websites you visit and the apps you use.
More about how Chrome personalizes content and ads
You can make changes in ad privacy settings
Chrome notes topics of interest based on your recent browsing history.

Sites you visit can also determine what you like based on your activity on the site. For example, if you visit a site that sells long-distance running shoes, the site might decide that you’re interested in running marathons.

Sites and their advertising partners can use your activity, such as how you spend your time on sites you visit, to personalize ads on other sites. For example, if you visit a site to find recipes for dinner, the site might decide that you're interested in cooking. Later, another site may show you a related ad for a grocery delivery service suggested by the first site.
Sites can ask Chrome for information to help personalize the ads you see.
Later, a site you visit can ask for this information — either your ad topics or ads suggested by sites you’ve visited.
A site you visit can ask for this information — either your ad topics or ads suggested by sites you've visited.
Chrome auto-deletes topics and sites that suggest ads within 30 days. Or you can block specific topics and sites you don’t like.

Sites you visit can ask Chrome for information to help them measure the performance of their ads. Chrome lets sites collect limited types of data, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site.
Learn more about how Google protects your data in our Privacy Policy.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>

Your Android device may include a similar setting. If ad measurement is turned on in Chrome and on your Android device, a company may be able to measure the effectiveness of an ad across web sites you visit and apps you use.
Measuring how well an ad performs
Personalize your experience while limiting what websites can learn about you
Site-suggested ads help limit what websites and their advertising partners can learn about you when they show you personalized content and ads.
With ad measurement, sites you visit can share information with other sites that helps them measure the performance of their ads.

Your Android device may include a similar setting. If ad measurement is turned on in Chrome and on your Android device, a company may be able to measure the effectiveness of an ad across web sites you visit and apps you use.
More ways to personalize your experience while limiting what sites can learn about you

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won’t use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also store shared data for longer than Chrome and combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>
Learn about and control new technologies that aim to replace third-party cookies
Most sites can’t use third-party cookies to track you as you browse, and sites can’t use third-party cookies in Incognito mode.
If a site isn’t working, you can try giving it temporary permission to use third-party cookies. <link>Learn more</link>
Most sites should work as expected
Chrome limits the amount of information sites can use to track you as you browse. You can change your settings to choose your own level of protection.
For more settings that relate to privacy, security, and data collection, see <link>Sync and Google services</link>
Can't start profiler because external storage is not ready
Encrypted bookmarks cannot be deleted. Others have been successfully deleted
Encrypted folders do not support moving directories
Please set your password! Note that once forgotten, it cannot be recovered. If you don't want to share it with others, provide them with an incorrect password.
Web apps used in the last month
Review which web apps to restore
Choose web apps to restore on this device. Apps shown here are based on your Chrome history.
Restore web apps you have recently used on devices connected to this account
Choose how to add the app to the home screen
Checking if app can be installed…
Click to open the app instead
You don’t have passwords saved in Google Password Manager.
If you previously exported passwords, look for a CSV file on your device and import them to your preferred password manager.
To start saving and using passwords with Google Password Manager, update Google Play services
Can't create QR Code. URL is more than %1$d characters.
To share with people nearby, let them scan this QR Code
Direct Navigation to QR Code Scan Result
Your QR Code Scan Result is:
Search using keyboard, voice, Incognito, or camera
Google Lens is not available on this device
Incognito is not available on this device
Voice search is not available on this device
Cookies, cache, and other site data
More options to delete browsing data
<link1>Search history</link1> and <link2>other forms of activity</link2> may be saved in your Google Account
The current page has been changed to Quick Center. Due to incomplete functionality, hidden tags are not currently supported. Stay tuned
You can request the desktop site for %1$s
You can request the mobile site for %1$s
Chrome will request the mobile site when the screen is narrow
You can reset it in more settings - appearance settings
Click to open the reading interface
reading aloud (with %1$d hours and %2$d minutes left)
Requesting notification permission to display read-aloud information
Rainsee reading: analyze the page text according to certain rules. If the reading effect is poor, please click the adaptation request in the upper right corner
There is no record of your reading at present. Please go to the novel website first, enter the reading page (please do not be in the directory), and turn on the reading mode
Here are the voices you can pick for reading out your web pages. If you like this voice and want me to keep using it just tap the voice name.
Get notified when an article can be shown in simplified view
Reading mode swipe up for preferences
Reading mode preferences opened at full height
Reading mode preferences opened at half height
Reading mode is always available here
failed to read aloud, you can try to switch the reader
Find your reading list in Bookmarks
You’ll find your reading list here
You can save pages to read later or offline
Add pages to your reading list for later
Find this Cardboard symbol on your viewer
The function of reading aloud can only be performed in web pages!
If the software remains in the background for a long time, it may cause the extension to be terminated. It will be reloaded when returning to the foreground.
Restore %1$s tabs as new background tabs.
Restore tab group %1$s, color %2$s, as a new background tab group.
You’ll find your recent tabs here
To see your tabs from wherever you use Chrome, sign in on all your devices
To get your tabs from your other devices, turn on sync.
Trust the third-party root certificate stored by the Android CA
It is recommended to enter the reading mode
Storage permission for the download directory has been revoked, please select the download directory again

This is a color attribute. On some devices it may cause crashes or black blocks, so it might be disabled by default. If disabled, some browsers may display messages like Browser not supported, please upgrade. If you encounter crashes, please turn it off.
Disabling reload disrupts the web page lifecycle, which may cause abnormalities. It is recommended to enable for news sites, blogs, forums, etc., for a better user experience.
Remember the decision on this site
This will delete the group from all devices signed into %1$s
Also delete your Chrome data from this device
are you sure you want to delete this collection from the cloud?
If you change the file extension, the file may open in a different application and potentially be a hazard to your device.
please allow access to the camera after retry

Resource full name resource analysis and network log. The function is similar to the "network" in the computer-side review element. Can help developers clearly view/manipulate network resources. If you do not have this knowledge, please do not open it. Disputes such as web page abnormalities caused by opening this function have nothing to do with the browser itself. Click Agree to represent your agreement.

The browser kernel is disabled and is restarting. If this prompt is frequent, it is recommended that you download the lightweight version or add the browser to the power saving optimization whitelist.
Please re open night mode in the sidebar
Some caches cannot be cleaned up completely due to file occupation. Do you want to restart the application? You can also configure automatic cleanup on exit in more settings
Synced devices for tab restoration available to be changed on touch. Navigate to review or restore selected tabs for the current device on touch. Keyboard hidden.
All selected tabs from the currently selected device will be restored.
Change to other synced devices under this menu item.
Review the selected tabs to be restored from the currently selected device.
Choose the device you’d like to get tabs from
You can get tabs from the device listed below
All tabs selected will be deselected, or all tabs deselected will be selected.
List of synced devices and selected tabs from those devices to be restored on fresh restore worklfow is closed.
Are you sure you want to clear all cookies and data from the current website?
Show quick center by swiping sideways
the specified entry can be deleted by right sliding

welcome to use the daily feature. Before using this feature, you must know and agree to the following terms: 1. If you integrate online news, all content will not be modified by yujianfang, and the content has nothing to do with yujianfang. If the new content is untrue or violates the law, please contact the corresponding platform 2. If you are a platform party, if you feel that this feature hurts your rights and interests, please be sure to inform us, Check the contact information in the more settings of the sidebar 3. The daily content does not represent any views of yujianfang, but a tool for you to aggregate and view information. As a user, you must not use it for any illegal purposes
please enter the web address, and the search engine placeholder is
Now, a right swipe takes you backward to see previous pages you’ve visited and a left swipe moves you forward
decoding, too many rules, please wait patiently
Something went wrong while displaying this webpage.
Open page in a new Incognito tab
If you’re seeing this frequently, try these <link>suggestions</link>.
Doesn’t noticeably slow down your browser or device.
Warns you if you use a password that has been compromised in a data breach.
Improves security for you and everyone on the web.
Warns you about dangerous sites, even ones Google didn’t know about before, by analyzing more data from sites than standard protection. You can choose to skip Chrome warnings.
When you’re signed in, this data is linked to your Google Account to protect you across Google services, for example increasing protection in Gmail after a security incident.
Sends the URLs of sites you visit and a small sample of page content, downloads, extension activity, and system information to Google Safe Browsing to check if they’re harmful.
When you're signed in, protects you across Google services.
Learn more about <link>how Chrome keeps your data private</link>
Real-time, AI-powered protection against dangerous sites, downloads, and extensions that's based on your browsing data getting sent to Google
Safe Browsing protects you against deceptive websites. If you turn it off, be extra careful when browsing, especially before entering passwords.
Does not protect you against dangerous websites, downloads, and extensions. Your Safe Browsing settings in other Google products won't be affected.
Sends URLs of some pages you visit, limited system information, and some page content to Google, to help discover new threats and protect everyone on the web.
Help improve security on the web for everyone
Protects against sites, downloads, and extensions that are known to be dangerous. If a page does something suspicious, URLs and bits of page content are sent to Google Safe Browsing.

Protects against sites, downloads, and extensions that are known to be dangerous. When you visit a site, Chrome sends an obfuscated portion of the URL to Google through a privacy server that hides your IP address. If a site does something suspicious, full URLs and bits of page content are also sent.
authoritative data, user comments, farewell to Internet scam
currently on the home page, no comments to show
multiple engines, fast switching, convenient and convenient
currently on the home page, please search
Chrome can help keep you safe from data breaches, unsafe websites, and more
Sign in to your Google account to check your passwords
Offline. Chrome can’t check for updates.
Notifications • Chrome removed these permissions because this site is dangerous
Can’t check passwords in your Google Account
Always allow notifications from this site
To protect your data, let Chrome remove permissions from sites that you haven’t visited recently
